orgBillingFields.icoHintSaved: Saved company ID — you can edit the fields below, or enter a different ID to look it up in ARES.
orgBillingFields.icoHintEmpty: Enter your company ID (8 digits) — we'll fill in the rest from ARES.
orgBillingFields.icoHintTyping: Keep typing — we'll search once you've entered 8 digits.
orgBillingFields.icoHintSuccess: Details filled in from ARES — feel free to edit them.
orgBillingFields.billingEmailHint: We'll send tax documents to this address. If left blank, we'll use your login email.

errors.notFound: Company ID {{ico}} was not found in ARES. Check the number or fill in the fields manually.
errors.tooMany: Too many searches. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.badFormat: The company ID isn't in the right format. Enter 8 digits.
errors.unavailable: ARES is currently unavailable. Try again or fill in the fields manually.
errors.generic: The search failed. Please try again.

recurringPaymentConsent.heading: Recurring payments (Card-on-File)
recurringPaymentConsent.chargeBullet: We'll regularly charge your card the plan price × your number of user seats ({{period}}).
recurringPaymentConsent.durationBullet: Payments continue until you cancel them.
recurringPaymentConsent.receiptBullet: We'll email you a tax document after every charge.
recurringPaymentConsent.priceChangeBullet: We'll notify you of any price change at least 30 days in advance.
recurringPaymentConsent.cancelBulletPrefix: Cancel recurring payments in Settings → Subscription or by emailing support — see
recurringPaymentConsent.consentPrefix: I agree to recurring payments under the terms above and to
recurringPaymentConsent.termsLinkText: Art. 6 of the Terms of Service

nudge.message: You can have SimpleCRM as an app right on your home screen.

iosModal.title: Add to Home Screen
iosModal.step1: In your browser, tap the Share button.

welcome.title: Welcome to SimpleCRM
welcome.body: We'll walk you through five steps to get oriented in a minute. You can skip the tour anytime and restart it via the ? icon in the top-right corner.

companies.title: Companies are the foundation
companies.body: Start with a company. Just enter the Company ID (IČO) — we'll fill in the name, address, and legal form from the ARES registry.

pipeline.title: A deal belongs in the pipeline
pipeline.body: The Pipeline shows a Kanban board of your deals. Add your first one via "+ Add deal" in the top right, and drag deals between stages as they progress.

reports.title: Reports will guide you
reports.body: Once you have data, you'll see who's leading the leaderboard, how fast deals close, and what isn't selling. Switching your role in Settings unlocks extra widgets for managers.

settings.title: Invite your team so it's not just you
settings.body: In Settings you can customize the pipeline, invite salespeople, and fill in your billing details. Done — you're ready to go!

feedback.intro: Something not working, or something missing? Write to us — we read every message.
feedback.kindLegend: What would you like to report?

bug.label: Report a bug
bug.description: Something isn't working as it should.

improvement.label: Suggest an improvement
improvement.description: An idea that would make work easier.

feedback.captionPlaceholder: E.g. Clicking the arrow makes the kanban card disappear.
feedback.bodyPlaceholder: Describe what you were doing, what you expected, and what happened instead.
feedback.attachmentsHint: Up to {{max}} files, PNG/JPEG/WebP, max. 5 MB each.
feedback.supportEmailSuffix: and we'll reply to your email.

errors.tooManyFiles: You can attach at most {{max}} files at once.
